languages.text: Плавные изгибы творения ксеносов не похожи ни на один образец техники, виденный вами ранее.
languages.translation_comment: Призрачный лорд эльдари — очередь на хардлайт

traits.locale_text: Плавные изгибы творения ксеносов не похожи ни на один образец техники, виденный вами ранее.

languages.text: The fluid curves of the xenos creation are unlike any piece of machinery you have ever seen.
languages.original_text: Плавные изгибы творения ксеносов не похожи ни на один образец техники, виденный вами ранее.

traits.locale_text: The fluid curves of the xenos creation are unlike any piece of machinery you have ever seen.

The fluid curves of the xenos creation are unlike any piece of machinery you have ever seen.

languages.text: Las fluidas curvas de la creación xenos son distintas a cualquier máquina que hayas visto antes.
languages.original_text: The fluid curves of the xenos creation are unlike any piece of machinery you have ever seen.

traits.locale_text: Las fluidas curvas de la creación xenos son distintas a cualquier máquina que hayas visto antes.

languages.text: 这异形造物流畅的曲线，跟你见过的任何机械都截然不同。
languages.original_text: The fluid curves of the xenos creation are unlike any piece of machinery you have ever seen.

traits.locale_text: 这异形造物流畅的曲线，跟你见过的任何机械都截然不同。

languages.text: Les courbes fluides de la création xénos ne ressemblent à aucune des machineries qu'il vous a été donné de contempler auparavant.
languages.original_text: The fluid curves of the xenos creation are unlike any piece of machinery you have ever seen.

traits.locale_text: Les courbes fluides de la création xénos ne ressemblent à aucune des machineries qu'il vous a été donné de contempler auparavant.

languages.text: Zeno yaratımının akışkan kıvrımları, şimdiye kadar gördüğün hiçbir makine parçasına benzemiyor.
languages.original_text: The fluid curves of the xenos creation are unlike any piece of machinery you have ever seen.

traits.locale_text: Zeno yaratımının akışkan kıvrımları, şimdiye kadar gördüğün hiçbir makine parçasına benzemiyor.

languages.text: 異種族の創造物は、流線型の曲線で、今まで見たことのない機械です。
languages.original_text: The fluid curves of the xenos creation are unlike any piece of machinery you have ever seen.

traits.locale_text: 異種族の創造物は、流線型の曲線で、今まで見たことのない機械です。

languages.text: Die sanften Formen der Xenoskreation ähneln keinem Maschinenteil, das du je gesehen hast.
languages.original_text: The fluid curves of the xenos creation are unlike any piece of machinery you have ever seen.

traits.locale_text: Die sanften Formen der Xenoskreation ähneln keinem Maschinenteil, das du je gesehen hast.
